scenarios.title: Engineering work requires the captured mission
scenarios.given: an MDE-enabled project with a captured mission
scenarios.then: the session starts from MISSION.md, project-local MDE state, and applicable central context before changing code

scenarios.title: Cranfield search uses OpenSearch-backed retrieval
scenarios.given: a user calls the Cranfield search endpoint with a non-empty query
scenarios.then: the Worker sends a generated OpenSearch multi_match request to the configured Cranfield index and maps returned hits without hardcoded query-specific results

scenarios.title: Search explain reveals the active retrieval path
scenarios.given: a user calls the Cranfield explain endpoint
scenarios.then: the response includes the incoming query, normalized query, dataset, architecture version, generated OpenSearch query, retrieval strategy, ranking logic, accepted architecture decisions, applied techniques, top result explanations, and latency metadata

scenarios.title: Live search has no runtime LLM dependency
scenarios.given: the live search source is inspected
scenarios.then: no OpenAI, Anthropic, chat completion, response generation, or Gemini runtime call is present in the search path

scenarios.title: Baseline evaluator computes relevance metrics
scenarios.then: it reports MAP, nDCG, Precision, Recall, and MRR-style metrics in a versioned experiment artifact

scenarios.title: Public Phase 1 endpoint availability
scenarios.given: the Worker and OpenSearch implementation exists
scenarios.then: a Cloudflare Worker deployment and live OpenSearch Cranfield index must be configured and validated before public readiness is claimed
scenarios.defer_reason: Cloudflare deployment target and live OpenSearch credentials were not available in this session.
